violations.text: The double door entrances/exits were observed to have gaps in the seals and not tightly closing. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The receptacle in the women's/shared toilet rooms are lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The outside dumpster was not covered (lid open) and observed to be missing a side sliding door. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered and maintained to be propely closed.. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
